plan.blog_title: The AI Effect in IT Jobs: Trends and Strategies
constraints: Target audience: IT professionals and technical leaders

tasks.title: Understand the AI Effect in IT Jobs
tasks.goal: Describe the AI effect in IT jobs and its implications for professionals.
bullets: Define the AI effect in IT jobs and its causes
Explain how AI is changing job roles and responsibilities
Discuss the impact of AI on job security and employment
Identify emerging job opportunities in AI-related fields

tasks.title: Develop AI-Enabled Skills
tasks.goal: Identify essential skills needed to work with AI and develop a plan to acquire them.
bullets: List the top AI-enabled skills in demand
Describe the benefits of acquiring AI skills for IT professionals
Outline a plan to acquire AI skills through online courses, certifications, or degree programs
Discuss the importance of staying up-to-date with AI developments

tasks.title: Embrace AI-Augmented Roles
tasks.goal: Explain how AI can augment existing job roles and responsibilities in IT.
bullets: Describe AI-augmented roles in IT and their benefits
Explain how to collaborate with AI systems to enhance productivity
Discuss the importance of adaptability and continuous learning in AI-augmented roles
Outline strategies for mitigating job displacement due to AI

image_specs.caption: Visualizing the future of work
image_specs.prompt: A diagram illustrating AI-augmented roles in IT
